name: Horsey Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender.
2. Puree on high until smooth and creamy.
3. Serve as a dipping sauce with turnip chips.
Per serving (1/4 cup): 71 cal, 5 g prot, 5 mg sod, 3 g carb, 5 g fat, 0 chol, 106 mg calcium
Hint: If using preserved or creamed horseradish, you may want to increase the amount used. Remember that horseradish is rather pungent--so add according to your taste.
